items.title: Corporate content control and partner continuity initiative Release
items.description: Release of Corporate content control and partner continuity initiative improvements aimed at moving Corporate account satisfaction and Corporate revenue share of wallet, anchored in premium revenue quality and operational resilience under disruption and partner complexity and led through Corporate, Agency & NDC Distribution with account-aware content controls and cleaner servicing paths. The quarter concentrates on digital retailing, disruption recovery, premium ancillary conversion, and cargo resilience so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase corporate account satisfaction by strengthening corporate, agency & ndc distribution with account-aware content controls and cleaner servicing paths and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

Increase in-policy booking rate by strengthening corporate, agency & ndc distribution with account-aware content controls and cleaner servicing paths and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase corporate revenue share of wallet by strengthening corporate, agency & ndc distribution with account-aware content controls and cleaner servicing paths and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

productBricks.change: Released Corporate, Agency & NDC Distribution with account-aware content controls and cleaner servicing paths.
Released Partner & Alliance Journey Orchestration with deeper continuity logic for disrupted mixed-carrier itineraries.
Released Offer, Pricing & Availability Management with stronger offer governance across corporate and partner contexts.
Released Operational Data, Revenue & Personalisation Platform with account-health and partner-leakage insight.

deliveryChannels.change: Deployed stronger corporate content control and servicing signals in the NDC and Agency API.
Deployed account-health and disruption insight in the Commercial Account Workspace.

items.title: Premium disruption recovery initiative Release
items.description: Release of Premium disruption recovery initiative improvements aimed at moving Self-service disruption recovery rate and Repeat guest rate, anchored in premium revenue quality and operational resilience under disruption and partner complexity and led through Disruption Recovery & Self-Service Reaccommodation with richer choice sets and policy-aware self-service recovery. The quarter concentrates on digital retailing, disruption recovery, premium ancillary conversion, and cargo resilience so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase self-service disruption recovery rate by strengthening disruption recovery & self-service reaccommodation with richer choice sets and policy-aware self-service recovery and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

Increase trip confidence index by strengthening disruption recovery & self-service reaccommodation with richer choice sets and policy-aware self-service recovery and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase repeat guest rate by strengthening disruption recovery & self-service reaccommodation with richer choice sets and policy-aware self-service recovery and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Decrease recovery decision cycle time by improving disruption recovery & self-service reaccommodation with richer choice sets and policy-aware self-service recovery and removing avoidable workflow friction.

Increase misconnected guest rate by strengthening disruption recovery & self-service reaccommodation with richer choice sets and policy-aware self-service recovery and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

businessKPIs.kpi: Irregular operations cost per disrupted flight
businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce irregular operations cost per disrupted flight by improving disruption recovery & self-service reaccommodation with richer choice sets and policy-aware self-service recovery and removing avoidable workflow friction.

productBricks.change: Released Disruption Recovery & Self-Service Reaccommodation with richer choice sets and policy-aware self-service recovery.
Released Trip Companion & Proactive Notifications with recovery prompts, airport guidance, and proactive alert sequencing.
Released Operational Control Tower with guest-impact prioritization alongside flight risk.
Released Customer Care & Case Management with disruption-specific queues and context handoff.

deliveryChannels.change: Deployed recovery actions and richer disruption visibility in the Guest Mobile App.
Deployed proactive disruption messaging and next-best-action nudges in the Proactive Messaging Layer.
Deployed guest-impact prioritization inside the Network Control Workspace.
Deployed disruption-specific servicing workflows in the Disruption Servicing Workspace.
